name: Entity Equipment
desc: Updates an entity's equipped item in a specific slot (main hand, armor slots).

implementation.overview: Updates a single equipment slot for an entity. Sent when players equip items, swap armor, or pick up items. ESP modules read S04 to display target armor/weapon in TargetHUD. PostDisabler (Gugustus) cancels S04 to hide own equipment changes from others.

modules.name: TargetHUD / ESP (Equipment Display)
modules.purpose: Read S04 to track what armor and weapon the target player is holding. Displayed in TargetHUD overlay.
